brand_identity.rationale: As a serious B2B operations tool for field agents and warehouse staff in Uzbekistan, the design must prioritize clarity, speed of data entry (one-handed usage), and high readability outdoors. The 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype ensures operational efficiency without unnecessary decorative elements.

colors.primary_description: Deep Carmine Red - Nods to the meat/sausage product domain while acting as a clear, authoritative action color.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first ergonomic density. Large touch targets for field agents operating one-handed, with generous spacing to avoid accidental taps.
spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements (buttons, inputs).
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: flex-col gap-4 (Standard mobile vertical stack). Use grid-cols-2 only for photo upload previews or split data stats.

buttons.primary: bg-[#C81E1E] text-white h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg active:opacity-80 shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 h-14 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg active:bg-slate-200
buttons.status_chip: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

inputs.text_field: h-14 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 text-base text-slate-900 focus:border-[#C81E1E] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C81E1E]/20
inputs.label: text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 mb-1.5 ml-1

cards.order_card: bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-3 active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform
cards.photo_upload: h-32 border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300 rounded-xl bg-slate-50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 active:bg-slate-100

navigation.bottom_tab: bg-white border-t border-slate-100 h-20 pb-safe pt-2 flex justify-around items-center shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
navigation.header: bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-4 border-b border-slate-100 sticky top-0 z-50

login_auth.layout: Vertical stack centered. Top half features abstract logistics background image with a gradient overlay. Bottom half is the clean white interaction area.
elements: Brand Logo/Text ('SausageTrade Uz')
Phone Number Input (with +998 prefix fixed)
Primary CTA: 'Kodni olish' (Get Code)
OTP Input (4-6 digits, large mono font)
Verify CTA: 'Tasdiqlash' (Verify)

agent_dashboard.layout: List view with a sticky header and prominent floating action button (FAB) or top-level CTA.
elements: Header: Welcome back [Agent Name], Current Date
Action: Massive 'Yangi Zakaz' (New Order) button at the top or as FAB
List: 'Mening Zakazlarim' (My Orders) sorted by newest.
Order Items: Client name, status chip, location preview, total items.

agent_order_creation.layout: Scrollable form with clear sectional dividers.
elements: Section 1: Mijoz (Client) - Phone number, Name
Section 2: Manzil (Location) - Read-only Map preview block (auto-detected GPS), raw text address input.
Section 3: Maxsulot (Product) - Category Select (Shadcn-style bottom sheet or picker), Product Name.
Section 4: Rasmlar (Photos) - 2 slotted dotted boxes for camera/gallery upload.
Bottom Sticky CTA: 'Zakazni Yuborish' (Send Order)

warehouse_dashboard.layout: Dense operational list. Prioritizes quick scanning of what needs to be prepared.
elements: Header: Ombor (Warehouse) Overview
Filter Tabs: Yangi (New) | Tayyorlanmoqda (Preparing) | Yetkazildi (Delivered)
Order Cards: Must prominently feature the Product name, Category, and photos thumbnail. Big tap targets to change status.

admin_dashboard.layout: Grid-based bento layout for analytics, followed by list management.
elements: Stats Grid: Total Orders today, Active Agents, Top Products.
Management Links: Agentlarni boshqarish (Manage Agents), Kategoriyalar (Categories).
Global Order Feed.

login_background.description: Clean, organized warehouse aisles, used at 20% opacity as a login screen backdrop.

accessibility_and_interactions.test_ids: All buttons, inputs, and navigation items MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-order-button').
accessibility_and_interactions.haptic_feedback: Use React Native haptics for order submission success, status changes, and photo uploads.
accessibility_and_interactions.keyboard_handling: Use KeyboardAvoidingView rigorously. The 'Zakazni Yuborish' button must remain visible or easily accessible above the keyboard.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an EXPO REACT NATIVE app. Translate these web-centric Tailwind rules into NativeWind classes or React Native StyleSheet equivalents.
For icons, prefer phosphor-react-native or expo/vector-icons (Lucide/Feather).
Do not build standard web tables for Admin; use scrollable FlatLists with Card structures since this is a mobile interface.
Use standard Expo APIs for Location (expo-location) and Camera/Gallery (expo-image-picker).
All text must be in UZBEK as per the problem statement.
